caption: A man with a towering, grey, conical hairstyle wears glasses, black over-ear headphones, a white button-down shirt, tan suspenders, and a red bow tie. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone in a room that resembles a clothing store, with framed photos on the wall and mannequins wearing black vests and white shirts in the background. A logo on the left side of the scene reads "TALKABOUT PODCAST," while red text to the right reads "GOSS TALK JOY." The man remains stationary and continues to speak, with only subtle changes in his facial expression and lip movements across the sequence. The background and equipment, including the microphone and the "LEE" brand signage on the wall, remain completely still, indicating a fixed camera position throughout the clip.
